name: Penetration Sweep + Register Build
description: End-to-end firestop coverage pipeline: detect every slab / wall / beam crossing, place or update the FRP family, audit coverage, schedule the register. Re-runnable — idempotent on PEN_PFV_UUID_TXT.

steps.name: Build seed families (idempotent)
steps._notes: First-time setup. No-op when the seed family is already in the project.

steps.name: Load shared parameters (PEN_*)
steps._notes: Binds the 19 PEN_* shared params to Specialty Equipment + the routed MEP categories so the detector and placer can stamp them.

steps.name: Detect crossings and place / update FRP instances
steps._notes: Runs SlabPenetrationDetector + WallPenetrationDetector + BeamPenetrationDetector against every MEP curve in the active view. FrpPenetrationPlacer drops face-based instances at each crossing and stamps the parameter pack. Idempotent — re-runs update existing instances rather than duplicate.

steps.name: Audit firestop coverage + structural review
steps._notes: Read-only audit. Surfaces orphan members, orphan FRP instances, and beam STRUCT_FAIL / STRUCT_REVIEW findings.

steps.name: Build / refresh Penetration Register schedule
steps._notes: Builds the Penetration Register from MR_SCHEDULES.csv — one row per FRP instance, grouped by host type.

_postNotes: After the sweep completes, run SwapToManufacturer to replace the seed families with vendor-specific firestops (Hilti / Promat / STI / 3M).
Mobile installers stamp PEN_INSTALL_DATE / PEN_INSTALLER_TXT / PEN_INSPECTION_DATE on-site through the Planscape mobile sign-off flow.
Beam STRUCT_FAIL findings must be resolved before fabrication — re-route the offending pipe / duct or move the beam location.
